update_instructions: To update an office entry edit the relevant state key. To add a new office add a new key under offices. Keys must be lowercase state names. Multiple states can map to same office by adding duplicate entries with same office details. Verify all details against cioins.co.in before updating.
jurisdiction_note: Jurisdiction is determined by address in the policy document. Not current address. Not Aadhaar address. Always use policy document address to determine correct office.
